description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: OHADA accounting law and financial reporting / SYSCOHADA framework
used_for: IFRS for consolidated statements where applicable

primary_sources.name: OHADA Regulation No. 01/2017/CM/OHADA on accounting and auditing professional practices

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: OHADA/SYSCOHADA financial-reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for OHADA, SYSCOHADA, AUDCIF, financial statements, or accounting-framework evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: OHADA accounting law and financial reporting / SYSCOHADA framework

rules.title: Statutory audit or commissaire aux comptes evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for statutory audit, external audit, commissaire aux comptes, ISA, or audit-report evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Professional ethics and independence controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for independence, ethics, conflict-of-interest, or professional-conduct language in accounting/audit documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Client due-diligence or AML routing is present for relevant professional services
rules.summary: Checks for client due diligence, suspicious transaction, KYC, or AML/CFT controls in relevant accounting services.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Client confidentiality or data-protection handling is documented
rules.summary: Checks for confidentiality and personal-data handling in accounting, assurance, or audit documentation.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2019-014 relating to protection of personal data
